underlying: Oregon U.S. Senate 2026 D-R margin in pp (Merkley D incumbent vs GOP)
method: Anchored on (a) Merkley's 2020 result 56.9-39.4 (+17.5pp), (b) Wyden 2022 +14.5 (~tougher year), (c) OR PVI ~D+6, Harris won OR by ~+13 in 2024, (d) Merkley running for fourth term as established incumbent, (e) D-favorable 2026 generic ballot. Mu=+17 anchors directly on his 2020 performance. Sigma 6.
notes: Merkley (D inc) won 2020 by +17.5. Solid D, no top-tier R challenger. Mu=+17 matches 2020. Sigma 6. Strikes start at P13 — even a weakened Merkley clears most lower buckets, but P29+ tail is meaningful only on a blowout.
